name: Brian Anderson
notes: We can supply and install all kinds of internal and external signage from flat panels, post mounted, illuminated, built up letters, wall/window graphics, vehicle graphics, manifestations, safety signs etc. In-house design service to supply proofs before a job goes to manufacture. We can also install jobs on a sub contractor basis (unbranded vehicle and workwear) for those who need any help on jobs. Coverage to the UK and fitters are IPAF, PASMA, CSCS certified and i also have SSSTS certification.

name: Jim Mitchell

strong proffesional attitude towards building and maintaining working relationships and see jobs through to the end.

name: Steve Phillips
company: Phillips & Bow LTD Sign and Graphics Specialists
notes: With a passion for the construction industry i went straight from school to obtain a NVQ level 2 in Joinery/ Shopfitting before switching  my skills to sign fitting. Now 15 years on i run 2 vans of vastly skilled Sign Installers based in Leeds. We take great pride in completing all installs to a top standard and i am forever interested in learning new skills to ensure i do the best possible job. I am always looking to widen my knowledge and connections within the industry so feel free to get in touch for any further background info, possible contracts i can assist on,  or just a general chat .

name: Tito Mouriño
notes: Pedco Ltd knows  that a fantastically designed job is still not complete until it is successfully installed. I provide  full site surveys and installation services throughout the UK and internationally. All of which are carried out by my experienced crew of installation experts. Installation of graphics and signage is often time critical and Pedco Ltd recognises the need to work to deadlines with high end results. We are well equipped to handle all aspects of graphic installations and follow client instruction, specific guidelines and work in accordance to risk assessments and method statements. We work with Visual Merchandisers, Interior Designers & Architects, Graphic Designers, Marketing & Brand Managers, Exhibition Designers and Event Organisers to get graphic installed to a high end finish and in a timely manner.
